sglang.title: Fix wrong BaseKVCacheMethod import in test_modelopt_fp8kvcache.py
sglang.author: Kare0638
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
Motivation
test/manual/test_modelopt_fp8kvcache.py imports BaseKVCacheMethod from vllm, but ModelOptFp8KVCacheMethod inherits from sglang's own BaseKVCacheMethod (sglang.srt.layers.quantization.kv_cache). They are two different classes, so assertIsInstance always fails.
Fixes #20243
Modifications
Ch

sglang.title: Fix default_max_tokens compute error in responses api when mtp is opened
sglang.author: LuYanFCP
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
Motivation
When using the /v1/responses endpoint without explicitly specifying max_tokens, the server calculates a default value as context_len - prompt_length. However, the tokenizer_manager._validate_one_request() adds num_reserved_tokens (e.g., 2 tokens for EAGLE speculative decoding) to the inpu

sglang.title: [Test] Refactor KL divergence and prefix cache branching to kits
sglang.author: roikoren755
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
Motivation

Refactoring some test utils and duplicated test methods to reusable kits.
Both kits introduced here (KLDivergenceMixin and PrefixCacheBranchingMixin) were originally created in #15829 , and are moved to a separate PR here for easier reviewing.
This PR also uses these kits in Qwen3-Next t

sglang.title: [AMD] Fix FP8 assertion failure in aiter MLA decode by falling back to self.k_scale
sglang.author: yichiche
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
Motivation
When layer.k_scale is None (the default in RadixAttention), the aiter ASM MLA kernel asserts q_scale.has_value() && kv_scale.has_value() for FP8 Q tensors. Fall back to self.k_scale (initialized to tensor([1.0])) at all 4 mla_decode_fwd call sites, matching the pattern used by flashmla_ba

sglang.title: [Security] Fix /rerun-ut bypassing run-ci gate for fork PRs
sglang.author: hnyls2002
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
Summary

Fork PR authors were auto-granted can_rerun_ut permission, allowing them to execute arbitrary code on self-hosted GPU runners without maintainer review (bypassing the run-ci label gate).
Now only non-fork PR authors get auto-granted can_rerun_ut. Fork PR authors need an explicit entry in CI

sglang.title: [diffusion]: clear file-path-only outputs on all ranks to prevent TP GPU memory skew
sglang.author: Ratish1
sglang.bodyExcerpt:

 In multi-GPU-per-worker (TP) diffusion runs, we observed persistent per-rank GPU memory skew after OpenAI image generation when save_output & return_file_paths_only. Complete Context is here zhaochenyang20/sglang-diffusion-routing/issues/38 .

Ignore FP8 quantization layers to improve model precision.
Modifications
Introduce a new environment variable SGLANG_FP8_IGNORED_LAYERS to specify the names of layers that should not be quantized. The values should be separated by commas, for example: model.layers.0,model.layers.1,self_at

sglang.title: Expose async LoRA interface to Offline Engine
sglang.author: anvdn
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
Motivation
We currently have no async interface to load or unload LoRA adapters. The existing [load|unload]_lora_adapter methods call self.loop.run_until_complete(...), which assumes there is no running event loop and will fail when used from async code.
These are exposed on vLLM side for instance:

Fuse the packed data flow with recurrent decode state update/output writeback to reduce intermedia

The bug
The kernel launches 256 blocks × 256 threads (8 warps).

vllm.title: fix(kv-cache): increase hybrid attention grouping threshold from 1.25 to 1.5
vllm.author: hai-meh-cs
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Problem
Hybrid attention models combined with multi-layer speculative decoding drafters can exceed the 1.25 ratio threshold in _get_kv_cache_groups_uniform_page_size, causing excessive KV cache padding and crashes during initialization.
Example: amazon/GPT-OSS-20B-P-EAGLE is a 4-layer EAGLE drafter

vllm.author: Csrayz
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Purpose
Fix the bug where usage information is incorrectly returned when stream_options is passed as an empty object in streaming requests.
before

after
